title: Organon Women's Health Accelerator
description_short: Organon's accelerator supporting startups developing innovative solutions in women's health, including reproductive health, maternal health, and menopause care. Open to early- to growth-stage companies globally.
accuracy_notes: Sponsor corrected from 'Organon' to 'Organon & Co.' (official legal/trade name). All other fields are accurate.

title: Saudi Premium Residency Programme
description_short: Saudi Arabia's long-term residency programme granting eligible foreign nationals permanent or temporary premium residency, allowing them to live, work, and invest in the Kingdom without a Saudi sponsor.
accuracy_notes: Sponsor name corrected to 'Saudi Premium Residency Center' (official English rendering used by the Centre). Sector 'Private Sector' is appropriate as a broad investment/residency programme. All other fields confirmed accurate.

title: WAM Saudi Investor Programme
description_short: WAM Saudi's investor programme connects international and regional investors with opportunities in Saudi Arabia's capital markets and asset management sector, facilitating market entry and regulatory guidance.
accuracy_notes: Sector corrected from 'Industrial & Manufacturing' to 'Financial Services'. WAM Saudi (Wealth and Asset Management) is a financial services and capital markets initiative — not an industrial/manufacturing programme. All other fields confirmed.

title: Green Climate Fund – Saudi Arabia Country Programme
description_short: The GCF's country programme for Saudi Arabia supports climate mitigation and adaptation projects aligned with the Kingdom's NDC commitments and Vision 2030 green goals, providing grants and concessional finance to eligible entities.
accuracy_notes: All fields confirmed accurate. GCF operates country programmes via accredited entities; Saudi Arabia is an eligible recipient country. Sector 'Environment Services', type 'grant', and eligibility 'Saudi Arabia' are all correct.

title: KAUST Competitive Research Fund (CRF)
sponsor_institution: King Abdullah University of Science and Technology (KAUST)
description_short: KAUST's Competitive Research Fund provides merit-based research grants to KAUST faculty for investigator-initiated projects across science, technology, engineering, and mathematics disciplines, with annual calls.
accuracy_notes: Sponsor name expanded to include the full official name with acronym. Sector 'Innovation & Entrepreneurship' is acceptable, though 'Education' could also apply; 'Innovation & Entrepreneurship' is retained as the fund drives research-led innovation. All other fields confirmed.

title: IFC SME Venture Capital Funds
description_short: The IFC invests in SME-focused venture capital and private equity funds in emerging markets, providing equity capital and technical assistance to fund managers targeting early- and growth-stage small and medium enterprises.
accuracy_notes: Sponsor name expanded to include acronym. All other fields confirmed accurate. IFC's SME venture capital programme operates on a rolling/open basis globally.

title: Abu Dhabi Investment Office – Financial Services Incentive Programme
description_short: ADIO's Financial Services incentive programme offers financial support packages, including grants and fee rebates, to attract financial services companies to establish or expand operations in Abu Dhabi.
accuracy_notes: Title expanded slightly to 'Financial Services Incentive Programme' for clarity and accuracy — ADIO programmes are officially labelled as incentive programmes, not just sector labels. Sponsor name standardised with acronym. All other fields confirmed.

title: Abu Dhabi Investment Office – Cleantech Incentive Programme
description_short: ADIO's Cleantech incentive programme provides financial incentives including grants and support packages to attract clean technology companies to Abu Dhabi, aligned with the UAE's net-zero 2050 strategy.
accuracy_notes: Title expanded to 'Cleantech Incentive Programme' for accuracy. Sponsor standardised with acronym. Sector 'Environment Services' confirmed appropriate for cleantech/clean energy focus. All other fields accurate.

title: Abu Dhabi Investment Office – Advanced Manufacturing Incentive Programme
description_short: ADIO's Advanced Manufacturing incentive programme offers grants and financial support packages to attract advanced and high-value manufacturing companies to set up or scale operations in Abu Dhabi.
accuracy_notes: Title expanded to 'Advanced Manufacturing Incentive Programme' for accuracy. Sponsor standardised with acronym. All other fields confirmed accurate.

title: Islamic Development Bank Scholarship Programme 2026-27
description_short: The IsDB Scholarship Programme provides merit and need-based scholarships to students from IsDB member countries for undergraduate and postgraduate studies in science, technology, engineering, mathematics, and health sciences.
accuracy_notes: Eligibility region corrected from 'MENA' to 'Global'. The IsDB scholarship is available to nationals of all 57 IsDB member countries spanning Africa, Asia, the Middle East, and beyond — not limited to MENA. Sponsor name standardised with acronym. All other fields confirmed.

title: Bahrain EDB – FinTech Sector Investment Opportunity
description_short: Bahrain EDB facilitates investment into Bahrain's growing FinTech sector, offering incentives, licensing support, and access to the CBB's regulatory sandbox for companies seeking to establish FinTech operations in the Kingdom.
accuracy_notes: Title expanded to 'FinTech Sector Investment Opportunity' for precision. Sponsor standardised with acronym. All other fields confirmed accurate.

title: Bahrain EDB – Manufacturing Sector Investment Opportunity
description_short: Bahrain EDB promotes manufacturing investment by offering land access, competitive costs, and incentives for companies establishing industrial and manufacturing operations in Bahrain's economic zones.
accuracy_notes: Title expanded to 'Manufacturing Sector Investment Opportunity' for precision. Sponsor standardised with acronym. All other fields confirmed accurate.

title: Bahrain EDB – Logistics Sector Investment Opportunity
description_short: Bahrain EDB supports investment in Bahrain's logistics sector, leveraging the Kingdom's strategic GCC location, Khalifa Bin Salman Port, and Bahrain Logistics Zone to attract regional and global logistics operators.
accuracy_notes: Title expanded to 'Logistics Sector Investment Opportunity' for precision. Sponsor standardised with acronym. All other fields confirmed accurate.

title: DIFC Company Establishment Programme
description_short: The DIFC offers a streamlined company establishment and licensing pathway for financial services, fintech, and professional services firms seeking to set up in Dubai's leading international financial centre with its common law framework.
accuracy_notes: Sponsor standardised with acronym. Type 'licensing' confirmed as the primary mechanism — DIFC's core offering is regulatory licensing and establishment. All other fields confirmed accurate.

title: MISA Premium Investor Residency
sponsor_institution: Ministry of Investment of Saudi Arabia (MISA)
description_short: MISA's Premium Investor Residency grants eligible foreign investors a long-term Saudi residency in exchange for qualifying investment thresholds, providing the right to live, work, and operate businesses in the Kingdom.
accuracy_notes: Sponsor standardised with acronym. Note: this is closely related to the Saudi Premium Residency but is the MISA-administered investor track specifically tied to investment licensing. Sector 'Private Sector' confirmed appropriate. All other fields accurate.

title: UNDP SDG Accelerator Programme
description_short: The UNDP SDG Accelerator supports entrepreneurs and social innovators developing solutions that advance the UN Sustainable Development Goals, offering mentorship, funding access, and market linkages across multiple country programmes.
accuracy_notes: Sponsor standardised with acronym. Sector 'Innovation & Entrepreneurship' confirmed appropriate. The UNDP operates multiple SDG-focused accelerators globally on a recurring cohort basis. All other fields confirmed accurate.

title: MISA Entrepreneur Residency
sponsor_institution: Ministry of Investment of Saudi Arabia (MISA)
description_short: MISA's Entrepreneur Residency track grants qualifying foreign entrepreneurs a Saudi residency to establish and grow startups or innovative businesses in the Kingdom, supporting Vision 2030 innovation ecosystem goals.
accuracy_notes: Sponsor standardised with acronym. Sector 'Innovation & Entrepreneurship' confirmed appropriate for an entrepreneur-track residency as distinct from the investor track (ID 15). All other fields confirmed accurate.

title: Tourism Development Fund – Startup Programme
description_short: The TDF Startup Programme provides funding, mentorship, and market access support to early-stage startups building innovative tourism products and services in Saudi Arabia, aligned with Vision 2030's tourism growth targets.
accuracy_notes: Title corrected to 'Startup Programme' (British English consistent with Saudi government official publications). Sponsor standardised with acronym. All other fields confirmed accurate.

title: DIFC Investment Funds Platform
description_short: The DIFC Investment Funds Platform enables fund managers to domicile, register, and administer investment funds within the DIFC's regulated common law environment, with access to global capital and DIFC's financial ecosystem.
accuracy_notes: Sponsor standardised with acronym. Type 'investment' confirmed appropriate as the platform facilitates investment fund establishment and management. All other fields confirmed accurate.

title: HRDF Hadaf National Employment Support Programme
description_short: HRDF's Hadaf programme subsidises Saudi national employment by reimbursing a portion of employee salaries and training costs to private sector employers, incentivising the hiring and upskilling of Saudi workers.
accuracy_notes: Title expanded to 'HRDF Hadaf National Employment Support Programme' for full accuracy. Sponsor clarified to 'Human Resources Development Fund (HRDF – Hadaf)' as Hadaf is the public-facing brand. Sector: 'Education' is a reasonable fit covering workforce training; however 'Private Sector' could also apply — 'Education' is retained as the fund's primary mechanism is training/skills development. All other fields confirmed accurate.
